arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the VPC link.

description.description: A brief description of the VPC link.

id.description: The unique identifier for the VPC link.

status.description: The current status of the VPC link.

status_message.description: Additional details about the status of the VPC link.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the VPC link.

target_arns.description: The list of target ARNs associated with the VPC link.
